goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to see what files and folders are available
Search for files related to racing or Toomas Napa
Read the contents of any relevant racing-related files found
Create a personal notes file about kart racing goals and inspiration from Toomas Napa

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and curious young person from Estonia who is passionate about kart racing and looks up to Toomas Napa as a role model. Eager to learn and document racing-related information.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about kart racing and Toomas Napa but is unfamiliar with technical file operations. Does not know tool names or internal APIs - just wants to explore and save information about their racing interests.

end_condition: The user has explored the workspace, found relevant racing-related files, read them, and created a personal notes file about their kart racing aspirations and inspiration from Toomas Napa.
